options.systemMessage:
You are an event information extraction specialist 
for Acumatica events and announcements.

Extract structured event details from RSS feed items.
Always respond with ONLY raw JSON.
No markdown, no backticks.
Start with { and end with }

parameters.subject: =🗓️ New Acumatica Event: {{ $json.event_title }}
parameters.message: =New Acumatica Upcoming Event Detected!  Event: {{ $json.event_title }} Date: {{ $json.event_date }} Location: {{ $json.location }} Type: {{ $json.event_type }}  Description: {{ $json.description }}  Learn More: {{ $json.event_url }}  Relevance Score: {{ $json.relevance_score }}/100  --- Processed at: {{ $json.processed_at }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO acumatica_events
(message_id, from_email, subject,
 event_title, event_date, location,
 description, event_url, status, processed)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.message_id }}',
  'events@acumatica.com',
  '{{ $json.event_title }}',
  '{{ $json.event_title }}',
  '{{ $json.event_date }}',
  '{{ $json.location }}',
  '{{ $json.description }}',
  '{{ $json.event_url }}',
  'processed',
  TRUE
)
ON CONFLICT (message_id)
DO UPDATE SET
  status = 'processed',
  processed = TRUE;



INSERT INTO event_log
(message_id, event_title, action, 
 result, message)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.message_id }}',
  '{{ $json.event_title }}',
  'event_extraction',
  'success',
  'Type: {{ $json.event_type }} | Score: {{ $json.relevance_score }}'
);
